props_visible: Clear glass tumbler containing hot steaming coffee/latte
Steam wisps rising from drink surface

text_overlays.content_summary: ضبّط مزاجك! — Fix/calibrate your mood! (bold white Arabic display type, large scale)

notable_visual_elements: Steam appears to transform into the Arabic text — integrated visual/steam effect
Bold Arabic display typeface fills upper 40% of frame
Split background: electric blue above, white shelf below — clean contrast
Drink at center bottom — headline dominates composition

cultural_notes.free_notes: 'ضبّط مزاجك' is a colloquial Saudi/Gulf expression meaning calibrate/fix your mood — it speaks directly to the coffee-as-mood-regulator cultural behavior. The steam-to-text visual metaphor is clever: the drink literally produces the feeling promised in the headline. This is a masterclass in simple high-impact F&B copy.

pattern_matches.notes: Single product centered against clean studio background, hero treatment
'ضبّط مزاجك' is textbook mood-trigger copy in colloquial Gulf Arabic
Steam wisps deliberately captured and integrated into the text concept
